Off Calendar Jun-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFFS MARY HWU and ROBERT HWU's Motion To Augment/Amend Expert Witness Disclosure -
Transferred to the Discovery Calendar to be heard on the same date at 9:00 am in room 301. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)

Plaintiffs Mary Hwu, Robert Hwu'S Ntc Of Mtn To Augment/Amend Expert Witness Disclosure
Off Calendar Jun-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Donald Krentsa, Esq., 415.788.2035, for plaintiffs Mary Hwu and Robert Hwu.
Michaael Gerchow, Deputy City Attorney, 415.554.3800, for defendant City and County of San Francisco.

RULING: Argued and the Court takes plaintiff's motion to augment/amend expert disclosure
under submission. Counsel are to submit separate proposed orders. Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.
*After hearing, the Court signs order granting plaintiff's motion to augment expert disclosure.*
